This experiment applied photo-electric -catalyzed to treat substantive mazarine (L) wastewater. It researched the relative factors which affected the decolorized degradation of dye wastewater.

Cloaked in Mazarine Blue, this Phantom has engraved door-sill plates, and the Spirit of Ecstasy emblem, which continues to celebrate its 100th anniversary.
